stem: A HR analytics study surveys 1000 staff members and observes 247 positive outcomes out of 1000 (24.7%). Estimate the true employee turnover rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.247. Wilson 95% CI: [0.2213, 0.2747]. Point estimate: 0.248.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
